items.title: The easiest backyard win once it gets warm
items.description: If the weather is finally nice and your toddler needs something to do, this splash pad is an easy yes. Quick setup, shallow water, and way less hassle than a pool.

items.title: Safe water play without the full pool setup
items.description: This is the kind of water play parents actually say yes to. Shallow, simple, and easy to pull out when you need outdoor time without a giant production.

items.keyword: outdoor toys that tire toddlers out
items.title: This burns toddler energy fast
items.description: When you need them outside and moving, this works. It keeps toddlers cool, busy, and way less likely to bounce off your walls all afternoon.
